1. [*Time inconsistency*]{.underline}: apply **hyperbolic discounting** to model the prioritization of immediate rewards over long-term ones

<div style="display: flex; gap: 1em; margin-top: -0.5em;">
<div style="flex: 1;">
<div style="margin-bottom: -1.5em;">

$$\begin{aligned}
&P(a' \mid s, d) \propto \exp(\alpha EU_{s, d}[a']) \\
&EU_{s,d}[a] = \frac{1}{1 + kd}U(s,a) + \underset{s',~a'}{\mathbb{E}}[EU_{s', d + 1}[a']]
\end{aligned}$$

</div>

</div>
<div style="flex: 1;">

*Image placeholder*

</div>
</div>
